chunk_text:
File: auth.py
Language: python
Summary: This module handles authentication by verifying JWT tokens and managing user sessions. It provides a function to verify the signature of incoming JWT tokens and a class to manage active user sessions.

File: auth.py
Function/Class: verify_token
Description: Verifies the signature of the incoming JWT token and returns user identity claims if valid.
Parameters: token (str): a base64 encoded JWT string
Returns: dict: containing user identity claims if the token is valid
